action_set_definitions.name: search_patient_by_name
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the clinical database for a patient's unique identifier using their full name.

full_name.description: The full name of the patient (e.g., 'John Doe').

action_set_definitions.name: get_patient_medical_profile
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full medical profile for a specific patient, including demographics, address, and current pharmacological regimen.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier of the patient.

action_set_definitions.name: get_trial_protocol_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the recruitment criteria, site locations, and flexibility parameters for a specific clinical trial.

trial_id.description: The ID of the clinical trial (e.g., 'ASTHMA-V2').

action_set_definitions.name: calculate_distance_eligibility
action_set_definitions.description: Calculates the distance between a patient's location and trial sites to determine geographic eligibility.

patient_address.description: The home address of the patient.

site_addresses.description: A list of trial site addresses.

action_set_definitions.name: update_recruitment_terminal_status
action_set_definitions.description: Transitions the patient's record to a terminal recruitment status and attaches required operational flags.

patient_id.description: The unique identifier of the patient.

status.description: The final status for the recruitment funnel.

reasoning.description: A brief explanation for the final status decision.

state_description.patient_profile: The current medical profile of the patient being matched, including demographics and clinical history.
state_description.screening_history: A log of trials that have already been evaluated and the reason for inclusion or exclusion.
state_description.active_trial_id: The ID of the clinical trial currently under detailed investigation.
state_description.matching_step: The current phase of the matching process (e.g., 'initial_search', 'criteria_screening', 'final_confirmation').
